title: xiigen.i18n-translation.preferences-requested.v1
description: Synthesized inbound event for GET /api/users/:userId/preferences. Handled by T670 UserPreferencesManager to resolve the user's locale (userOverride > tenant default priority per Decision 7). Missing document returns { locale: null, userOverride: false } — not an error.

tenantId.description: Tenant owning the user record (ALS — CF-810 scope isolation).

userId.description: Document id in xiigen-user-preferences — the authenticated user whose preferences are being read.
